---
title: "‘Forewarned, Forearmed: In the Person of a Thoughtful Aunt.’ By C.M. Yonge"
---

## ‘Forewarned, Forearmed: In the Person of a Thoughtful Aunt.’ By C.M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1901
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Short Story in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 11.40 (Jan. 1901) 21-26

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
